recommendations.title: No Man of God
recommendations.overview: The complicated relationship that formed between the FBI analyst Bill Hagmaier and serial killer Ted Bundy during Bundy's final years on death row.

recommendations.title: mid90s
recommendations.overview: In 1990s Los Angeles, a 13-year-old spends his summer navigating between a troubled home life and a crew of new friends he meets at a skate shop.

recommendations.title: The Interview
recommendations.overview: A duel between a suspected murderer and a detective pressed by people who want results. But whose skin is really wanted?

recommendations.title: Stutz
recommendations.overview: In candid conversations with actor Jonah Hill, leading psychiatrist Phil Stutz explores his early life experiences and unique, visual model of therapy.

recommendations.title: The World Unseen
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on two women who engage in a dangerous relationship during South Africa's apartheid era.

recommendations.title: Killers of the Flower Moon
recommendations.overview: When oil is discovered in 1920s Oklahoma under Osage Nation land, the Osage people are murdered one by one—until the FBI steps in to unravel the mystery.

recommendations.title: Mrs. Harris Goes to Paris
recommendations.overview: A 1950s London cleaning lady falls in love with an haute couture dress by Christian Dior and decides to gamble everything for the sake of this folly.

recommendations.title: Phil Spector
recommendations.genres: Drama, TV Movie, Crime, History, Music
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on the relationship between Phil Spector and defense attorney Linda Kenney Baden while the music business legend was on trial for the murder of Lana Clarkson.

recommendations.title: To Catch a Killer
recommendations.overview: Baltimore. New Year's Eve. A talented but troubled police officer is recruited by the FBI's chief investigator to help profile and track down a mass murderer.

recommendations.title: Mutiny on the Bounty
recommendations.overview: Fletcher Christian successfully leads a revolt against the ruthless Captain Bligh on the HMS Bounty. However, Bligh returns one year later, hell bent on revenge.
